title: tragacantha rariflora
intro: Tragacantha rariflora, also known as the sparse-flowered milkvetch or Astragalus rariflorus, is a flowering plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha rariflora include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Tragacantha rariflora can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
